mapper.select: SELECT s.song_id, a.name, s.title, al.cover_image_url, sc.total_score FROM songs_tbl s JOIN artists_tbl a ON s.artist_id = a.artist_id JOIN albums_tbl al ON s.album_id = al.album_id JOIN ( SELECT song_id, SUM(score) AS total_score FROM song_score_tbl WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 7 AND created_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1 GROUP BY song_id ) sc ON s.song_id = sc.song_id ORDER BY sc.total_score DESC FETCH FIRST 15 ROWS ONLY

SELECT s.song_id, a.name, s.title, al.cover_image_url, sc.total_score FROM songs_tbl s JOIN artists_tbl a ON s.artist_id = a.artist_id JOIN albums_tbl al ON s.album_id = al.album_id JOIN ( SELECT song_id, SUM(score) AS total_score FROM song_score_tbl WHERE created_at >= SYSDATE - 1 AND created_at < SYSDATE GROUP BY song_id ) sc ON s.song_id = sc.song_id ORDER BY sc.total_score DESC FETCH FIRST 15 ROWS ONLY

SELECT s.song_id, a.name, s.title, al.cover_image_url, sc.total_score FROM songs_tbl s JOIN artists_tbl a ON s.artist_id = a.artist_id JOIN albums_tbl al ON s.album_id = al.album_id JOIN song_genre_tbl sg ON s.song_id = sg.song_id JOIN ( SELECT song_id, SUM(score) AS total_score FROM song_score_tbl WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 7 AND created_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1 GROUP BY song_id ) sc ON s.song_id = sc.song_id WHERE sg.genre_id = #{genreId} ORDER BY sc.total_score DESC FETCH FIRST 15 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO song_score_tbl ( score_id, user_id, song_id, score, created_at ) VALUES ( song_score_seq.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{songId}, #{score}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT s.song_id, s.title, a.name AS artist_name, al.title AS album_title, g.name AS genre_name, g.genre_id, al.cover_image_url, s.song_path FROM songs_tbl s JOIN artists_tbl a ON s.artist_id = a.artist_id JOIN albums_tbl al ON s.album_id = al.album_id JOIN song_genre_tbl sg ON s.song_id = sg.song_id JOIN genres_tbl g ON sg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE s.song_id = #{songId}

SELECT s.song_id, s.title, a.name AS artist_name, al.title AS album_title, g.name AS genre_name, g.genre_id, al.cover_image_url, s.song_path FROM songs_tbl s JOIN artists_tbl a ON s.artist_id = a.artist_id JOIN albums_tbl al ON s.album_id = al.album_id JOIN song_genre_tbl sg ON s.song_id = sg.song_id JOIN genres_tbl g ON sg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE sg.genre_id = #{genreId} AND s.song_id != #{songId} FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
